Package org.key_project.slicing.analysis

Class AnalysisResults

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.slicing.analysis.AnalysisResults
public final class AnalysisResults extends Object
Results of the dependency analysis algorithm.
See Also:
  • DependencyTracker.analyze(boolean, boolean)

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    final Map<Node,List<Node>>
    branchStacks
    Branch stacks, as determined by the rule application de-duplication algorithm.
    final boolean
    didDeduplicateAggressive
    Whether the rule app de-duplication algorithm performed was run in "aggressive" mode.
    final boolean
    didDeduplicateRuleApps
    Whether the rule app de-duplication algorithm ran.
    final boolean
    didDependencyAnalysis
    Whether the dependency analysis algorithm ran.
    final ExecutionTime
    executionTime
    Execution timings of the analysis algorithms.
    final Proof
    proof
    The analyzed proof.
    final RuleStatistics
    ruleStatistics
    Mapping of (rule display name) to (total applications, useless applications, initial useless applications).
    final int
    totalSteps
    Total amount of rule applications.
    final int
    usefulBranchesNr
    Equal to size of uselessBranches.
    final Set<GraphNode>
    usefulNodes
    Set of graph nodes required by useful rule applications.
    final Set<Node>
    usefulSteps
    Set of useful proof steps.
    final int
    usefulStepsNr
    Amount of useful rule applications.
    final Set<BranchLocation>
    uselessBranches
    Set of branches in the proof guaranteed to be omitted in the proof slice.

  • Field Details

    • proof

      public final Proof proof
      The analyzed proof.

    • totalSteps

      public final int totalSteps
      Total amount of rule applications.

    • usefulStepsNr

      public final int usefulStepsNr
      Amount of useful rule applications.

    • ruleStatistics

      public final RuleStatistics ruleStatistics
      Mapping of (rule display name) to (total applications, useless applications, initial useless applications).

    • usefulSteps

      public final Set<Node> usefulSteps
      Set of useful proof steps.

    • usefulNodes

      public final Set<GraphNode> usefulNodes
      Set of graph nodes required by useful rule applications.

    • uselessBranches

      public final Set<BranchLocation> uselessBranches
      Set of branches in the proof guaranteed to be omitted in the proof slice.

    • usefulBranchesNr

      public final int usefulBranchesNr
      Equal to size of uselessBranches.

    • branchStacks

      public final Map<Node,List<Node>> branchStacks
      Branch stacks, as determined by the rule application de-duplication algorithm.

    • didDependencyAnalysis

      public final boolean didDependencyAnalysis
      Whether the dependency analysis algorithm ran.

    • didDeduplicateRuleApps

      public final boolean didDeduplicateRuleApps
      Whether the rule app de-duplication algorithm ran.

    • didDeduplicateAggressive

      public final boolean didDeduplicateAggressive
      Whether the rule app de-duplication algorithm performed was run in "aggressive" mode.

    • executionTime

      public final ExecutionTime executionTime
      Execution timings of the analysis algorithms.

  • Constructor Details

    • AnalysisResults

      public AnalysisResults(Proof proof, int totalSteps, RuleStatistics ruleStatistics, Set<Node> usefulSteps, Set<GraphNode> usefulNodes, Set<BranchLocation> uselessBranches, Map<Node,List<Node>> branchStacks, boolean didDependencyAnalysis, boolean didDeduplicateRuleApps, ExecutionTime executionTime)
      Specify the results of analyzing a proof.
      Parameters:
      proof - the analyzed proof
      totalSteps - the number of steps in the proof
      ruleStatistics - statistics on analyzed rules
      usefulSteps - set of useful steps to include in the slice
      usefulNodes - set of useful graph nodes
      uselessBranches - set of useless branches
      branchStacks - branch stacks (see SlicingProofReplayer for details)
      didDependencyAnalysis - whether the dependency analysis algorithm ran
      didDeduplicateRuleApps - whether the rule de-duplication algorithm ran
      executionTime - timings

  • Method Details

    • branchIsUseful

      public boolean branchIsUseful(BranchLocation branchLocation)
      Parameters:
      branchLocation - branch location
      Returns:
      whether that branch is marked as useless

    • indicateSlicingPotential

      public boolean indicateSlicingPotential()
      Returns:
      whether these analysis results suggest the proof can be sliced further

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
